name: You Are The Teleprompter
description:
In this scenario, you write the news that will appear in the teleprompter, and the news anchors have to tell the audience the detailed news story, then you can see the viewers's reactions to the stories.

Ideally just write a short phrase about the story and let the anchors develop it.

Sequel of She's watching you on TV and You Are The GPS
creator: KalzK
